basic_details.short_information: Chief Medical and Health Officer Durg (CMHO Durg) Subject Specialist Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CMHO Durg. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the CMHO Durg Subject Specialist Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

content_sections.heading: CMHO Durg Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CMHO Durg Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CMHO Durg Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CMHO Durg Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in Interview Merit List based on experience and interview marks

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CMHO Durg Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 27 July 2026. Candidates should report between 11:30 AM and 01:30 PM on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 3 vacancies have been announced for the posts of Medical Specialist, Radiologist, and Pathologist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The required qualifications include MBBS/MD/DNB in General Medicine/Internal Medicine for Medical Specialist, MD/DNB/DMRD in Radiology for Radiologist, and MD/DCP/DNB for Pathologist.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the candidates?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 70 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 2,00,000-00 for some posts and Rs. 1,50,000-00 for others per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for CMHO Durg recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Walk-in Interview and a Merit List prepared considering experience and interview marks.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Office CM&HO Durg Sabha Kaksh.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis under the DMF fund.
